title: Minimalist Launcher
summary: Landing Page for a minimalistic Launcher app

body.raw:
## The Challenge
„Design and develop a landing page for my own minimalist Launcher app"


## Key Features
- Fully responsive (mobile first)
- Scroll-triggered animations
- Interactive nutritional information display
- Conversion-optimized CTA placement
- Performance-optimized (lazy loading, WebP)

<iframe src="/projects/minimalistlauncher/index.html" style={{width: '100%', height: 480, border: 0, borderRadius: 8}}></iframe>
